summary: Stabilization pass testing complete - All 17 backend tests passed, all UI flows verified. Customer invoices API returns all states, admin orders shows all orders with tabs, vendor orders from vendor_orders collection working, notifications using recipient_user_id, vendor sidebar cleanup complete, admin invoice drawer shows BrandedDocPreview.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All stabilization features verified: 1) Customer invoices API returns invoices in all states (pending_payment, payment_under_review, paid, etc.), 2) Admin orders API returns ALL orders with tabs (All Orders, Awaiting Release, Released, Completed) and enriched with sales_owner/vendor_count, 3) Vendor/Partner fulfillment API returns orders from vendor_orders collection with correct partner_id matching, 4) Customer notifications API uses recipient_user_id field correctly, 5) Vendor sidebar shows 'My Orders' instead of 'Fulfillment Queue' and does NOT show affiliate items, 6) Admin invoice drawer shows BrandedDocPreview component with Konekt branding, 7) Admin sidebar uses light theme matching customer/partner sidebars.

CUSTOMER_INVOICES_ALL_STATES.details: GET /api/customer/invoices returns invoices in all states without restrictive filtering

ADMIN_ORDERS_NO_FILTER.details: GET /api/admin/orders/list returns ALL orders with tabs (All Orders, Awaiting Release, Released, Completed), enriched with sales_owner and vendor_count

VENDOR_ORDERS_CORRECT_SOURCE.details: GET /api/partner-portal/fulfillment-jobs returns orders from vendor_orders collection with partner_id OR vendor_id matching

CUSTOMER_NOTIFICATIONS_RECIPIENT_USER_ID.details: GET /api/customer/notifications uses recipient_user_id field in query

VENDOR_SIDEBAR_MY_ORDERS.details: Partner/Vendor sidebar shows 'My Orders' instead of 'Fulfillment Queue'

VENDOR_SIDEBAR_NO_AFFILIATE.details: Partner/Vendor sidebar does NOT show affiliate items when logged in as vendor

ADMIN_INVOICE_BRANDED_PREVIEW.details: Admin invoice drawer shows BrandedDocPreview component with Konekt branding, line items, totals, bank transfer details

ADMIN_SIDEBAR_LIGHT_THEME.details: Admin sidebar uses light theme (bg-white) matching customer/partner sidebar style

CUSTOMER_ORDERS_SALES_CONTACT.details: Customer orders API enriches orders with sales contact info from sales_assignments

PARTNER_DASHBOARD.details: Partner dashboard API returns partner info and summary metrics

PAYMENTS_QUEUE.details: Admin payments queue API returns pending payment proofs
